headlines.title: Seven more sentenced over Texas ICE detention centre shooting

headlines.title: Spanish government ‘quietly bans’ use of Palantir over national security concerns
headlines.snippet: The Spanish government has reportedly banned the use of Palantir, a US surveillance firm, due to national security concerns. This move, detailed by El Confidencial, stems from fears of potential leaks of sensitive information, although no official announcement has been made.

headlines.title: Gaza interim administration says talks in Cyprus ‘highly productive’

headlines.title: Israeli Knesset passes bill limiting mosque loudspeakers
headlines.snippet: The Israeli Knesset has passed a preliminary reading of a bill that would restrict the use of loudspeakers in mosques. The bill, if enacted, would require permits for public address systems and grant police authority to halt violations.

headlines.title: Lebanon’s president defends Lebanon-Israel framework agreement
headlines.snippet: Lebanon’s president has defended the country's recently signed ceasefire framework agreement with Israel. He stated that Lebanon negotiated on its own behalf and did not relinquish its principles in the agreement.
